---
title: "IMPLAN"
format: html
editor: visual
---

Here I pull in IMPLAN data to get a list that matches industry codes with industry numbers to populate the SAM. 

```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)

# Import data
df <- read_csv("../IMPLAN/IxISamDetails.csv")

# Keep paying only
df <- df %>% 
  select(PayingCode, PayingDescription)


# Keep one per industry
df <- df %>% 
  distinct()

# Export list
write_csv(df, "../IMPLAN/industry_code_list.csv")

```
